design_philosophy: A modern, professional productivity tool for preschool teachers. It avoids childish cartoon aesthetics while maintaining a warm, inviting atmosphere. Focuses on generous spacing, soft geometry, and earthy pastels to reduce cognitive load during a teacher's busy day.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid for dashboards with generous internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.page_container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8 md:py-12
layout_and_spacing.card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E6E2D6] shadow-sm p-6 sm:p-8 transition-all duration-200

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have a smooth hover state (e.g., bg darkens, subtle lift).

login_background.description: Abstract pastel textured background. Use on the left side of the split-screen login page.

dashboard_empty_state.description: Happy preschool teacher in a colorful classroom. Use as a welcoming image in the empty state or onboarding dashboard.

routes.name: Login
routes.description: Split screen layout. Left: Login background image with a welcoming quote 'Geleceği şekillendiren ellere, hoş geldiniz.' Right: Google Auth button.

routes.name: Sınıf Kurulum Sihirbazı
routes.description: Step-by-step wizard (React Hook Form + Zod). Step 1: Eğitim Modeli (Maarif vs EÇE). Step 2: Sınıf Saatleri (Giriş, Çıkış, Kahvaltı, Öğle Yemeği, İkindi).

routes.name: Kontrol Paneli
routes.description: Overview dashboard. Bento grid showing 'Toplam Öğrenci', 'Bugünkü Yemek Saatleri', 'Günlük Aktiviteler'. Uses the placeholder image if no class is set up.

routes.name: Öğrenci Listesi
routes.description: Grid of StudentCards. Each card has name, age, health warning badge (if any allergies), and quick action buttons (Call Parent, WhatsApp).

routes.name: Öğrenci Kayıt Formu
routes.description: Comprehensive form. Visual separation using grouped form sections with soft background highlights. Required fields marked with '*'. Optional fields clearly distinct.

routes.name: Rapor Taslağı
routes.description: Interface to select date range (Shadcn Date Picker with range) and generate a draft report shell.

routes.name: Sınıf Ayarları
routes.description: Update education model and daily schedules.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Use Vite + React + Tailwind + React Router DOM.
Implement pure React Context for 'AuthContext' and 'ClassContext'. Mock the Google Login flow by setting a hardcoded user object on click.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for complex dashboard layouts to maintain the bento grid structure, instead of over-relying on rigid Shadcn Cards.
Use React Hook Form + Zod for 'Sınıf Kurulum Sihirbazı' and 'Öğrenci Kayıt Formu'.
For the backend (FastAPI), implement MongoDB schemas using Motor (async). Collections: 'teachers' and 'students'.
All interactive elements MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-google-button').
Ensure language is entirely Turkish across the UI.
Do NOT use purple or violet anywhere in the application.
Use Phosphor Icons (duotone) for all iconography.
Include an 'Allergies' badge in the Student Card using the 'danger' color (#C86B5E) to immediately alert the teacher.
